data.description:
## Why
Collapse the agent's monitoring to ONE call returning ONE typed outcome, so agents never correlate votes/labels/status — and the "both votes green but conflicts" trap is handled inside the tool, not by every session.
## What
A project command (project CLI/script, NOT `rebar` core; may `import rebar` only for ticket ops) that requests a land and returns one typed terminal outcome + distinct exit code. Blocking `--wait` + single-shot `land-status`.
## Scope
The agent-facing command + the outcome enum contract. Lives in project tooling, not `src/rebar`.
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `land <change> --wait` sets `Autosubmit`, blocks until terminal, returns one typed outcome (`merged | needs_rebase | ci_failed | review_failed`) as JSON + a distinct exit code per outcome.
- [ ] `land-status <change>` single-shot variant returns the same enum without blocking (fire-and-forget then check back).
- [ ] The bot's recorded outcome (from the failure-handling story) is authoritative; the command falls back to native `Verified -1`/`LLM-Review -1` for failures the bot did not originate.
- [ ] Command lives in PROJECT tooling (repo CLI/script), NOT `rebar` core; may `import rebar` only for ticket ops (e.g. close the ticket on merge). No Gerrit-specific landing logic in `src/rebar`.
- [ ] The outcome enum is documented as the stable, versioned contract; agents depend only on it.
data.title: S4 Agent landing contract: land/land-status command + typed outcome enum (project tooling)
